session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. Just run and report - do NOT fix anything.

session.assistant:
## make fast-ci failed: Prettier formatting issues
**Exit code: 1 (failure)**
### Summary The `make fast-ci` command failed due to **Prettier code style issues**. Most checks passed, but 9 markdown files need formatting:
**Files with formatting issues:** - docs/learned/architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md - docs/learned/architecture/git-plumbing-patterns.md - docs/learned/cli/erk-exec-commands.md - docs/learned/cli/land-learn-integration.md - docs/learned/cli/workflow-run-list.md - docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md - docs/learned/tui/keyboard-shortcuts.md - docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md - docs/learned/tui/tui-command-registration.md
### Individual Check Results - **Linting**: All checks passed - **Ruff format check**: 1626 files already formatted - **Markdown check**: Passed - **Exec reference check**: OK - **Type checking (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit tests (erk)**: 5487 passed in 21.62s - **Unit tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 4.34s - **Unit tests (erk-statusline)**: 112 passed in 0.82s - **Unit tests (erkbot)**: 114 passed in 2.26s - **Prettier check**: Code style issues found in 9 files
